title: About - 𝕋𝕣𝖊𝖓𝖉𝖞 𝕋𝖗𝖆𝖛𝖊𝖑
meta_description: Discover the story of Trendy Travel, your premium transport partner in Marrakech
subtitle: Welcome to trendy travel

our_story.title: Our Story
our_story.paragraph1: We are proud to say that no one knows Morocco like we do. Trendy Travel is a tourist transport agency founded in 2017 in Marrakech.
our_story.paragraph2: With our fleet of premium vehicles and experienced drivers, we offer a unique transport experience that combines Moroccan tradition with modern service.
our_story.paragraph3: Over 10,000 satisfied customers have trusted us for their travels in Marrakech and throughout Morocco.

excellence.title: Excellence
excellence.description: Premium service with Mercedes vehicles and certified professional drivers.

reliability.title: Reliability
reliability.description: Guaranteed punctuality and 24/7 service available for all your travels.

authenticity.title: Authenticity
authenticity.description: Authentic discovery of Morocco with our expert local guides.

marrakech.title: Marrakech, Our City
marrakech.paragraph1: Based in the heart of the Red City, we know every alley of the medina, every palace and every secret garden of Marrakech.
marrakech.paragraph2: From the majestic Jemaa el-Fna square to the sumptuous Majorelle gardens, through the colorful souks and authentic riads, we help you discover the true soul of Marrakech.
marrakech.quote: Marrakech is not just our workplace, it's our passion that we share with you.

features.vehicles: Latest generation Mercedes V-Class and Vito
features.comfort: Air conditioning, Wi-Fi and leather seats

cta.title: Ready to Discover Marrakech?
cta.subtitle: Contact us now to book your premium transport and live an unforgettable experience in Marrakech.
